content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "最喜歡的食物",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你喜歡吃什麼菜？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ xǐhuān chī shénme cài?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 xi3huan1 chi1 shen2me cai4?",
          "translation_en": "What food do you like to eat?",
          "translation_ko": "무슨 요리를 좋아하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我比較喜歡吃清淡的菜，不要太辣。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ bǐjiào xǐhuān chī qīngdàn de cài, bùyào tài là.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 bi3jiao4 xi3huan1 chi1 qing1dan4 de cai4, bu4yao4 tai4 la4.",
          "translation_en": "I prefer light food, not too spicy.",
          "translation_ko": "저는 담백한 요리를 더 좋아해요. 너무 맵지 않은 걸로요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那你最喜歡吃什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nà nǐ zuì xǐhuān chī shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 ni3 zui4 xi3huan1 chi1 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "Then what is your favorite food?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 가장 좋아하는 음식이 뭐예요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我最喜歡吃滷肉飯，很香，口味也不錯。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zuì xǐhuān chī lǔròufàn, hěn xiāng, kǒuwèi yě bùcuò.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 zui4 xi3huan1 chi1 lu3rou4fan4, hen3 xiang1, kou3wei4 ye3 bu4cuo4.",
          "translation_en": "My favorite is braised pork rice; it's very fragrant and tastes good.",
          "translation_ko": "루러우판을 가장 좋아해요. 향도 좋고 맛도 괜찮아요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "聽起來很好吃，我也愛吃滷肉飯。",
          "pinyin": "Tīng qǐlái hěn hǎochī, wǒ yě ài chī lǔròufàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ting1 qi3lai2 hen3 hao3chi1, wo3 ye3 ai4 chi1 lu3rou4fan4.",
          "translation_en": "Sounds delicious; I also love braised pork rice.",
          "translation_ko": "맛있을 것 같아요. 저도 루러우판을 좋아해요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What is B's favorite food?",
          "question_ko": "B가 가장 좋아하는 음식은 무엇입니까?",
          "options_en": ["Braised pork rice", "Spicy food", "Light food"],
          "options_ko": ["루러우판", "매운 음식", "담백한 음식"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tones of 喜歡, 比較, 最, and 愛吃.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell me about your favorite food. What do you like to eat? Use words like 喜歡, 比較喜歡, 最喜歡, 愛吃, 口味, 清淡, 辣, 香."
    },
    {
      "title": "飲料選擇",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "你好，請問要喝什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐngwèn yào hē shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3wen4 yao4 he1 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, what would you like to drink?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 무엇을 드시겠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我想喝茶，可是不喜歡太甜的。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiǎng hē chá, kěshì bù xǐhuān tài tián de.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xiang3 he1 cha2, ke3shi4 bu4 xi3huan1 tai4 tian2 de.",
          "translation_en": "I'd like to drink tea, but I don't like it too sweet.",
          "translation_ko": "차를 마시고 싶은데, 너무 단 건 싫어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "那可以選微糖，口味比較清淡。",
          "pinyin": "Nà kěyǐ xuǎn wēi táng, kǒuwèi bǐjiào qīngdàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 ke3yi3 xuan3 wei1 tang2, kou3wei4 bi3jiao4 qing1dan4.",
          "translation_en": "Then you can choose low sugar; the flavor is lighter.",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 당도를 낮게 선택하시면 돼요. 맛이 더 담백해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好，我要一杯綠茶，微糖，去冰。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, wǒ yào yī bēi lǜchá, wēi táng, qù bīng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, wo3 yao4 yi1 bei1 lü4cha2, wei1 tang2, qu4 bing1.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll have a cup of green tea, low sugar, no ice.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 녹차 한 잔 주세요. 당도는 낮게, 얼음은 빼주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "沒問題，等一下。",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí, děng yīxià.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2, deng3 yi1xia4.",
          "translation_en": "No problem, please wait a moment.",
          "translation_ko": "알겠습니다. 잠시만 기다려 주세요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What drink did the customer order?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 어떤 음료를 주문했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Green tea, low sugar, no ice", "Black tea, normal sugar", "Coffee, hot"],
          "options_ko": ["녹차, 당도 낮음, 얼음 없음", "홍차, 일반 당도", "커피, 따뜻한 것"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, paying attention to the intonation of 不喜歡, 選, 微糖, and 去冰.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Order a drink at a tea shop. Tell the staff your preference for sweetness and ice. Use words like 想喝, 不喜歡, 選擇, 微糖, 去冰, 口味."
    },
    {
      "title": "活動選擇",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "這個週末你想做什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Zhège zhōumò nǐ xiǎng zuò shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4ge4 zhou1mo4 ni3 xiang3 zuo4 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "What do you want to do this weekend?",
          "translation_ko": "이번 주말에 뭐 하고 싶어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我想看電影，可是不喜歡太吵的地方。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiǎng kàn diànyǐng, kěshì bù xǐhuān tài chǎo de dìfang.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xiang3 kan4 dian4ying3, ke3shi4 bu4 xi3huan1 tai4 chao3 de di4fang5.",
          "translation_en": "I want to watch a movie, but I don't like places that are too noisy.",
          "translation_ko": "영화 보고 싶은데, 너무 시끄러운 곳은 싫어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那我們去看電影，選一個安靜的電影院。",
          "pinyin": "Nà wǒmen qù kàn diànyǐng, xuǎn yī ge ānjìng de diànyǐngyuàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 wo3men qu4 kan4 dian4ying3, xuan3 yi1 ge5 an1jing4 de dian4ying3yuan4.",
          "translation_en": "Then let's go watch a movie and choose a quiet cinema.",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 영화 보러 가요. 조용한 영화관을 골라요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好啊，我覺得看電影比逛街更好。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a, wǒ juéde kàn diànyǐng bǐ guàngjiē gèng hǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a5, wo3 jue2de5 kan4 dian4ying3 bi3 guang4jie1 geng4 hao3.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I think watching a movie is better than shopping.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요. 쇼핑보다 영화 보는 게 더 나은 것 같아요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "真的嗎？我比較喜歡逛街，可是也可以看電影。",
          "pinyin": "Zhēn de ma? Wǒ bǐjiào xǐhuān guàngjiē, kěshì yě kěyǐ kàn diànyǐng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhen1 de5 ma5? Wo3 bi3jiao4 xi3huan1 guang4jie1, ke3shi4 ye3 ke3yi3 kan4 dian4ying3.",
          "translation_en": "Really? I prefer shopping, but I can also watch a movie.",
          "translation_ko": "정말요? 저는 쇼핑을 더 좋아하는데, 그래도 영화 볼 수 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "那我們先看電影，再去逛街，好不好？",
          "pinyin": "Nà wǒmen xiān kàn diànyǐng, zài qù guàngjiē, hǎo bù hǎo?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 wo3men xian1 kan4 dian4ying3, zai4 qu4 guang4jie1, hao3 bu4 hao3?",
          "translation_en": "Then let's watch a movie first, then go shopping, okay?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 영화 먼저 보고, 쇼핑하러 가는 게 어때요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好啊，聽起來不錯。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a, tīng qǐlái bùcuò.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a5, ting1 qi3lai2 bu4cuo4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, sounds good.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요. 괜찮네요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What activity does B prefer over shopping?",
          "question_ko": "B는 쇼핑보다 어떤 활동을 더 선호합니까?",
          "options_en": ["Watching a movie", "Eating out", "Walking in the park"],
          "options_ko": ["영화 보기", "외식하기", "공원 산책"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "free_response_prompt": "Talk about your weekend plans. Tell your friend what you like and don't like to do. Use words like 想, 不喜歡, 比較喜歡, 覺得, 看起來, 聽起來, 更好, 選擇."
    }
  ]
}
